Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Jack S. Marquez, Esq., appearing for Defendant. Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is off Calendar/fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. (212)

MOTION TO COMPEL INDENTIFICATION/PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Sim & Yoon Corporation's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $440, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
